defect_summary: Emission control module calibration may trigger derate under specific duty cycle
remedy: Update calibration and verify aftertreatment performance

defect_summary: DEF line routing may cause low reductant pressure in cold conditions
consequence: Emission warning and derate may occur
remedy: Inspect routing and replace affected line kit

defect_summary: Wheel seal installation variation may lead to oil leak
Actuator connector retention may be insufficient
consequence: Loss of boost and warning lamp
remedy: Inspect connector and update harness clip

defect_summary: Sensor heater circuit may set false fault in high humidity
